package rulefixtures

import (
	"sort"
)

// scenario for sort_before_first_or_membership_only: Sorting a collection when only the first element or min/max is needed.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: hot_path; severity: info.
func scenario365Positive(values []string) string {
	for range values {
		sort.Sort(sort.StringSlice(values))
	}
	if len(values) == 0 { return "" }
	return values[0]
}
